en: Somebody help me! These frickin' nuggets were supposed to go out minutes ago!
ko: 누가 좀 도와줘 이 너겟 몇 분 전에 나갔어야 했다고

en: Someday, I will be a beautiful butterfly.
I have a secret ingredient, jelly beans.
ko: 언젠가 나는 예쁜 나비가 될 거야 비밀 재료가 있어 젤리빈

en: I asked if you would like more tamales.
ko: 언젠가 나는 예쁜 나비가 될 거야 비밀 재료가 있어 젤리빈

en: See, that's what I thought you'd say. Yes.
Can I interest you in a dessert?
